sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113703" key="xeirourghte/os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χειρουργ-ητέος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n113703.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be operated on,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
